property.name: testGetFeedbackAllDetails
property.value: Verify retrieval of all feedback records from the repository

property.name: testFeedbackCustomerNamePersistence
property.value: Verify customer name is correctly saved and retrieved in feedback

property.name: testFindByMenuItemId_MultipleRecords
property.value: Verify retrieval of multiple feedback records for a specific menu item ID

property.name: testCreateFeedback_VerifyMenuItemLink
property.value: Verify that feedback is correctly associated with the specified menu item during creation

property.name: testCreateFeedBack
property.value: Verify feedback creation and persistence in the repository

property.name: testRepositorySaveCalledOnce
property.value: Verify that the repository save method is invoked exactly once during feedback creation

property.name: testRepositoryFindAllCalled
property.value: Verify that repository findAll method is invoked when retrieving all feedback records

property.name: testCreateFeedback_VerifyRating
property.value: Verify that the rating value is correctly stored and retrieved when creating feedback

property.name: testFeedbackCommentNotEmpty
property.value: Verify that feedback comment is not empty and is properly stored during creation

property.name: testFindByMenuItemId
property.value: Verify retrieval of feedback records for a given menu item ID

property.name: testFindByMenuItemId_EmptyList
property.value: Verify that an empty list is returned when no feedback exists for the given menu item ID

property.name: testGetFeedbackAllDetails_Empty
property.value: Verify that an empty list is returned when no feedback records are available

property.name: testGetMenuItemById_Found
property.value: Verify that a menu item is successfully retrieved when a valid ID is provided

property.name: testUpdateMenuItem_VerifyPriceChange
property.value: Verify that the price of a menu item is correctly updated when modified

property.name: testDeleteMenuItem_RemovesFromOrderItems
property.value: Verify that deleting a menu item removes it from all associated order items

property.name: testUpdateMenuItem_Found
property.value: Verify that an existing menu item is successfully updated with new details

property.name: testUpdateMenuItem_NotFound
property.value: Verify that update operation returns null when the menu item does not exist

property.name: testDeleteMenuItem_NoOrders
property.value: Verify that a menu item is deleted successfully when it is not associated with any orders

property.name: testRepositoryFindByIdCalled
property.value: Verify that the repository findById method is invoked during menu item retrieval

property.name: testDeleteMenuItem
property.value: Verify that a menu item is deleted and associated records are updated accordingly

property.name: testMenuItemDuplicateEntries
property.value: Verify that multiple menu items including duplicates are handled correctly during retrieval

property.name: testMenuItemNamePersistence
property.value: Verify that menu item name is correctly saved and retrieved from the repository

property.name: testMenuItemPriceValidation
property.value: Verify that menu item price is accepted and validated during creation

property.name: testGetMenuItemById_NotFound
property.value: Verify that no menu item is returned when an invalid ID is provided

property.name: testGetAllMenuItems
property.value: Verify retrieval of all available menu items from the repository

property.name: testDeleteMenuItem_NotFound
property.value: Verify that an exception is thrown when attempting to delete a non-existing menu item

property.name: testMenuItemRestaurantAssociation
property.value: Verify that a menu item is correctly associated with its restaurant during creation

property.name: testUpdateMenuItem_IdUnchanged
property.value: Verify that the menu item ID remains unchanged after an update operation

property.name: testGetAllMenuItems_EmptyList
property.value: Verify that an empty list is returned when no menu items are available

property.name: testAddMenuItem
property.value: Verify that a new menu item is successfully added and persisted in the repository

property.name: testGetOrderById_Found
property.value: Verify that an order is successfully retrieved when a valid order ID is provided

property.name: testGetOrderById_NotFound
property.value: Verify that no order is returned when an invalid order ID is provided

property.name: testGetOrdersByCustomer
property.value: Verify retrieval of all orders associated with a specific customer

property.name: testPlaceOrder_Success
property.value: Verify that an order is successfully placed when valid restaurant details are provided

property.name: testGetAllOrders
property.value: Verify retrieval of all orders from the repository

property.name: testPlaceOrder_RestaurantNotFound
property.value: Verify that order placement fails when the specified restaurant is not found

property.name: testCustomerDetails_Exists
property.value: Verify that customer details check returns true when the customer exists

property.name: testCustomerDetails_NotExists
property.value: Verify that customer details check returns false when the customer does not exist

property.name: testGetAllAssignments
property.value: Verify retrieval of all restaurant manager assignments with correct details

property.name: testAssignManager_AlreadyAssigned
property.value: Verify that assigning a manager already linked to a restaurant throws an error

property.name: testAssignManager_Success
property.value: Verify successful assignment of a manager to a restaurant

property.name: testGetRestaurantById_NotFound
property.value: Verify that no restaurant is returned when an invalid restaurant ID is provided

property.name: testDeleteRestaurant_NotFound
property.value: Verify that an exception is thrown when attempting to delete a non-existing restaurant

property.name: testCreateRestaurant
property.value: Verify successful creation of a restaurant with associated menu items

property.name: testDeleteRestaurant
property.value: Verify deletion of a restaurant and proper handling of associated orders and menu items

property.name: testUpdateRestaurant
property.value: Verify that restaurant details are correctly updated with new values

property.name: testGetRestaurantById_Found
property.value: Verify that a restaurant is successfully retrieved when a valid ID is provided

property.name: testGetAllRestaurants
property.value: Verify retrieval of all restaurants from the repository

property.name: contextLoads
property.value: Verify that the Spring Boot application context loads successfully without errors

property.name: testLoadUserByUsername_NotFound
property.value: Verify that an exception is thrown when attempting to load a non-existing user by username

property.name: testRegisterUser
property.value: Verify successful user registration with password encoding and persistence

property.name: testFindByUsername
property.value: Verify retrieval of user details by username from the repository

property.name: testGetUserRolesDetails
property.value: Verify retrieval of all users along with their roles

property.name: testLoadUserByUsername_Found
property.value: Verify successful loading of user details when a valid username is provided

property.name: testGetUserByUsername
property.value: Verify fetching user entity using username service method
